name: Thad Jones
abstract: Thaddeus Joseph Jones (March 28, 1923 – August 20, 1986) was an American jazz trumpeter, composer and bandleader who has been called "one of the all-time greatest jazz trumpet soloists".

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Jazz Stars at Midnight
Newport Jazz Festival: Count Basie and His Orchestra
Newport Jazz Festival: Count Basie and His Orchestra
Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Betty Carter and Her Trio/ Thad Jones-Mel Lewis Orchestra with Dizzy Gillespie, Elvin Jones, and Hank Jones
Newport Jazz Festival: Sarah Vaughan and Her Trio/ Thad Jones-Mel Lewis Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Håkan Rydin
about_quotes.evidence: I even played a lot with Thad Jones even after the education. ... Playing with Thad Jones was very special. ... since I got this gig, of course I prepared myself, so I learned his songs
about_quotes.doc_title: Håkan Rydin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Dodgion
about_quotes.evidence: Mel called one day and said, “Oh, Thad Jones and I are starting a band and we would like you to play in the band. Would you be interested?” I said, “I wouldn’t miss it for anything.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Dodgion interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 9, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Roland Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: In 1969 I had been with the Thad Jones band for about two and a half, not quite three years... I hired Thad... Thad came and played with me on a regular basis.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roland Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: I was in Thad Jones and Mel Lewis’ original band. We rehearsed every Monday night... I worked for the band for about three months at the Vanguard
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Wess
about_quotes.evidence: I got Eddie Jones in the band, Bill Hughes, Sonny Cohn, Eric Dixon, Thad Jones... Yeah I got a whole lot of people in the band, you know.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Wess interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Majesty of the Seas, May 29, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Danko
about_quotes.evidence: I had this shot to play with Thad Jones and the first gig I did with them was a quartet gig... so anyway I had a shot to do the big band
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Danko interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 28, 2021
